cursor.desc: Set `cursor` to `next_cursor` returned by the previous call to list items in the next page.

entity_type.desc: The type of entity to assign to the policy. Currently, `USER` is supported.

limit.desc: The maximum number of items to return. Must be between 1 and 1000, both inclusive.

policy_name.desc: The name of the policy to fetch entities for. Currently, `email_password` is the only policy that may be used with this method.

desc: Fetch all the entities assigned to a particular authentication policy by name.

errors.feature_not_enabled: This method is only available for Enterprise organizations.
errors.not_an_admin: This method is only accessible by Org Owners and Admins.
